posts.text:
Venezuela just took down Japan. These WBC games have been awesome.

Video

Complete and total evisceration of Florida by Vanderbilt today. Great shooting from the Commodores, but 18 team assists to two turnovers is incredible level guard play. Vandy could have beaten anyone in the country today. Welcome to March.

This is a league promoting itself primarily to young girls. Men’s sports leagues are often moronic, but I actually think women’s sports leagues are worse, often demonic. How does a women’s sports league have a pro trans flag?! This is explicitly endorsing dudes playing.
The National Women’s Soccer League official poster of the new league year features the gay pride flag and the trans pride flag, but no United States flag.

The self driving Tesla is the second most transformative tech creation of the 21st century and I think it’s going to eventually surpass the iPhone, which is currently number one. The Tesla SD impact is just beginning, it’s like living in the future:

Video

No one in the media is talking about how well things are going in Venezuela because things are going so well in Venezuela.


Embajada de los EE.UU., Venezuela (@usembassyve)

En la mañana del 14 de marzo de 2019, la bandera estadounidense fue arriada por última vez en la Embajada de los Estados Unidos en Caracas. Esta mañana, 14 de marzo de 2026, a la misma hora, mi equipo y yo izamos la bandera de los Estados Unidos—exactamente siete años después de haber sido retirada.

Ha comenzado una nueva

If Melania Trump had done book illustrations for a book that did the exact same thing, how would media cover it? What if she had done this for a book with anti-black commentary? And then what if Trump called that criticism “reprehensible” how would media react?


Josie Stratman (@JosieStratman)

Mayor Mamdani says his wife, Rama Duwaji, was not aware of anti-Israel posts (like calling some Israeli citizens “parasites”) from an author she illustrated an essay for. 

Mamdani calls that rhetoric “r

If 9/11 happened today, many Americans would cheer and say we deserved it. Much of our nation has lost the ability to distinguish between good and evil. I discussed with @JesseBWatters:

Video

Final thoughts: 1. Read more history. You’ll see how much more difficult all your forebears had it & be much less of a whiny pussy. 2. America is the greatest force for freedom in history of world. But most kids don’t know this. Worse, they believe the opposite. That’s ominous.

In summation, I don’t believe modern American media is capable of covering the United States as a force for good in the world and that seems like a hugely seismic reality that will continue to have massive negative implications on all stories in the country.

Democrats would largely refuse to enlist and fight the concept of a draft being legal, requiring mass imprisonment. (No way Canada fights today. Millions of Dems would flee to Canada.) American media would call this an unwinnable and unjust war.

The anti-interventionist wing would be even more popular in America today — remember this was a big deal back then with Charles Lindbergh leading the don’t fight charge — and whether to enter the war would remain a huge debate even after Pearl Harbor.

The Japanese attacking Pearl Harbor seems like it would be hard to cover with America as the bad guy, but two immediate anti-US stories would emerge: 1. America staged the attack conspiracy. 2. Japan was justified in the attack because of US colonial imperialism.

A third important factor too: 3. White people can’t be victims (and Jewish people are seen as white by the media.) This means there would be TONS of left wing support for Nazis eradicating the Jews. (And your antisemitic racists on the right would also favor it.)

How would modern American media cover World War II? I ask because I think two things are true: 1. Modern media is unable to cover good & evil because they believe America is largely evil therefore her foes can’t be. 2. Identity politics have replaced individual responsibility.

Bro, go touch some grass, even Jewish women aren’t obsessed with sucking Jewish cock.


🐸 Dragon Groyper 🐸 (@DragonGroyperr)

you’re a fucking retard who’s obsessed with sucking jewish cock



— https://nitter.net/DragonGroyperr/status/2032808680228360340#m
